fn_def_list.fn_code:
void
hw_port_attach (struct hw *me,
		int my_port,
		struct hw *dest,
		int dest_port,
		object_disposition disposition)
{
  attach_hw_port_edge (me,
		       &me->ports_of_hw->edges,
		       my_port,
		       dest,
		       dest_port,
		       disposition);
}

void
hw_port_detach (struct hw *me,
		int my_port,
		struct hw *dest,
		int dest_port)
{
  detach_hw_port_edge (me,
		       &me->ports_of_hw->edges,
		       my_port,
		       dest,
		       dest_port);
}
